programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 4
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 2
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 3
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 4
programme.desc: $1 million is on the line in Las Vegas! Darren Elias arrives looking for his fifth WPT title against WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and battled-tested pro David Baker in an epic matchup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 2
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 2
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 2
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 2

programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: Illusjonen av majestet
programme.desc: En feil sving etter å ha gått ut av en slipstream sender Andromeda inn i Prolon-systemet. De redder en fluktpute fra en viss katastrofe, men stoltheten vil ha den tilbake.

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: Mannskapet søker en tapt koloni av Nietzscheans og oppdager et annet mannskap som i det skjulte har hjulpet dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dommens dag, Vredens dag
programme.desc: Mannskapet installerer en ny AI i et nytt Commonwealth-slagskip, og naturlig nok går ikke ting som de skal.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen
programme.desc: Tyr overbeviser Nietzscheans at han er reinkarnasjonen til Drago Museveni.
programme.sub-title: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen

programme.title: Andromeda: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt
programme.desc: En melding fra en samler sender Dylan på et oppdrag for å redde et gissel og finne restene av Commonwealth-flåten.
programme.sub-title: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Waking the Tyrant's Device
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stoppe en verdensbygger før han setter i gang en annen invasjon.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbelt eller ingenting
programme.desc: Dylan blir kidnappet av Nietzscheans og tvunget til å spille tankespill til underholdning for fangene hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper/Slett
programme.desc: To Nietzschean-søsken er i en avstand over et våpen som kan eliminere høyere hjernefunksjoner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Snart den nærende virvelen
programme.desc: Tyr kommer tilbake, etter å ha sluttet seg til Collectors, og krever aldersruten fra sine tidligere besetningsmedlemmer.

programme.title: Andromeda: Verden snur seg rundt henne
programme.desc: En gisselsituasjon oppstår når mannskapet konfronterer Tyr.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kanal til skjebne
programme.desc: En feil sving i glidestrømmen fører Andromeda til et fengselsopprør.

programme.title: Andromeda: Machines of the Mind
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Opphøyet grunn, strålende datter
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Torment, the Release
programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager en forsendelse med biorustning.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Butt Certain
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, In Deed
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing with the Devil
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Criticism
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Armored Car Killings, Fumbles Robber, Dahlia/Torso Connection, Tunnel of Cocaine and Black Hope Curse (Pts. 1 & 2).

programme.desc: This episode includes: Casino Cowboy, KC Blast, Road Rage, Australian UFO, San Marino Bones and Psychic Spy.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: D.B. Cooper (Pts. 1 & 2), Richard's Rampage, Log Cabin Fraud, Chair of Death and Wood I Lie To You.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Burned Evidence, Dark Dante, Skeleton Canyon, Con/Doc and Smitty.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 7

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 8

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 9

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 10

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Salem Secrets, Pierre's Amnesia, Florida Crime Spree, Ness, Canadian Camper and Rock of Fortune.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Killed Superman?, Satchel Bandit, Ghostbusters, Til Death Do Us Part, Money From Heaven and Hot Jock.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bones Knows, Model's Third Notebook, Thrill Killer, Noah's Ark, Bad Friday and Ghosts Go To Court.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tommy and His Parents, Pet Heroes, Cop Killer Escape, Hell's Angels Fugitive and Death Row Mom (Pts. 1 & 2)

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Green River Killer + UD, Poison Shake, Matchmaker Ghost, Police Captain's Death, Lenny Dirickson and Dead Ringer + UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Reincarnated Submariner, Wanted Weaver, Smitty, Oliver, A Manpanzee and Caruana.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Don's Near Miss, Lost In Jamaica, Dutch Schultz Treasure, Voodoo, Stamper's Rampage and Burned Businessman.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Update: Bermuda Triangle, Campus Calamity, Car Crash Thank You, Breakout Mom and Healing Touch.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Witch Hunt, The Other Intern, Victorio's Gold (Pts. 1 & 2) and Phantom Judge.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: War of the Depues, Update: Gypsy Fraud, Armando Garcia, Big Foot, Payback Killer and Florida Film Flam + UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Con Artist Cop, Astarte, Mystery Hitchhiker, Holy Grail, Update: Carlucci and Train Wreck Amnesia.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brotherhood of Hate
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In the Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Body Count
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Obsessions
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Barn
programme.desc: Something Strange is haunting the remains of a colliery in Cheshire and Ghost Dimension head in to uncover the truth behind the activity!

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Tutbury Castle
programme.desc: The team head to Tutbury Castle in Derbyshire to investigate the paranormal reports at the location. Past Hunters appear to have caught the Tutbury Ghost on camera.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Haunted and Cursed Magpie Mines
programme.desc: Haunted Magpie Mines are located in the Peak District of Derbyshire. Believed to be one of the most paranormal mines in the UK. Will a ghost be caught on camera? and will any of the paranormal equipment make contact with the spirit world?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.
programme.sub-title: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.
programme.sub-title: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.
programme.sub-title: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Block
programme.desc: The team investigate a disused factory in Burton-Upon-Trent. Reports of paranormal happenings are common and the team are ready for anything.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hull to investigate ghostly goings on inside of a former chocolate factory. The investigation turns out to be no picnic, as the ghosts haunting make direct contact with the team.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Man with a Cane
programme.desc: The team head to Bolton and investigate the Old Three Crowns. Haunted by the spirit of a very angry man with a deadly cane and an upset, young, ghostly girl, will they uncover why the girl is so upset? And could they encounter the angry spirit man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?
programme.sub-title: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
programme.sub-title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?
programme.sub-title: Did You Ever Have My Baby?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?
programme.sub-title: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?
programme.sub-title: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?
programme.sub-title: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?
programme.sub-title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?
programme.sub-title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.
programme.sub-title: Can't Always Get What You Want

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidis hjemkomst blir ødelagt når moren hennes misliker hennes plastisk kirurgi. Kristin og jentene drar til Miami for Super Bowl-helgen, men det blir dårlig stemning når den harde festingen hennes begynner å bekymre Audrina, Lo og Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Når ryktene begynner å spres om Kristins festing, får Stephanie skylden. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr, men det stopper ikke Brody fra å prøve seg på henne. Spencer blir opprørt når han møter på Stephanie på Kristins fest.

programme.title: The Hills: The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Heidi arrangerer en fest for naboen hennes, men det blir overskygget av at Spencer blir sint på Holly. Kristin oppfordrer Audrina til å forplikte seg til Ryan, og prøver deretter å komme nærmere Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: This Is Goodbye
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencers oppførsel fører til at deres venner og familie tar et vanskelig valg. Kristin og Brody roter, men er enige om å fortsette som single. Ryan skuffer Audrina når han ikke dukker opp for en kveld på byen.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Bird
programme.desc: Brody risikerer sitt vennskap med Kristin når han begynner å date ei annen jente. Lo setter Stephanie opp på en dobbeldate. Ryan gir Audrinas venner en ny sjanse.

programme.title: The Hills: Ghost From The Past
programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.
programme.sub-title: A Legend in His Own Mind

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.
programme.sub-title: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Going Going Gone!
programme.desc: En eks som truer med å endre Megan, ankommer. Kris avslører sine følelser for Ella. Kori og Sofie har en real styrkeprøve. Nathan må fatte en stor avgjørelse når tiden til en OG er over!

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale!
programme.desc: Nok en eks truer to av kjendisparene. SOS leverer sin endelige sexbombe. Den siste middagen gir en stor overraskelse. Blir det en lykkelig slutt eller ender alt i tårer?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Paradise From Hell
programme.desc: 10 realitykjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når eksene deres begynner å dukke opp fra stranden (utover andre overraskelser) for å ødelegge hyggen. Tennes gamle flammer eller åpnes gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Being Shady 101
programme.desc: Den tiende single ankommer huset og lander midt i et trekantdrama. Farrah irriterer de hun bor sammen med. En eks sprer et skittent rykte når sårede følelser forvandles til hevngjerninger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Simon Says
programme.desc: Farrah får en stor overraskelse i Shack of Secrets. En eks til en eks ruinerer en spirende romanse og avslører noen løgner. Den første eksen sendes hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Worst Date Ever
programme.desc: To ekser slår seg sammen for å knuse Maya og gjengen hennes. En uventet overraskelse setter et av husets sterkeste par i fare.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Jay Is For Jealous
programme.desc: Huset feirer at Farrah er tilbake. Sjalusi fører til fysisk konfrontasjon da en intim sannhet blir avslørt. Noe uventet skjer ved elimineringen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Low Blows
programme.desc: En etterlengtet eks ankommer, spenning som har småputret lenge eksploderer omsider og starter en voldsom krangel. Farrah trenger seg på andres anliggender, noe som fører til enda mer kaos i huset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Revenge is Sweet
programme.desc: Handlinger får konsekvenser når eksene får høre om de mindre pene tingene singlene sa om dem. Jays usikkerhet rundt Morgans mange ekser når kokepunktet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: Et stormende forhold blir turbulent når den slemme Angela kommer tilbake for å røre i gryta og stjele noen menn. Huset tar helt av når en dyrefest går skeis.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Un-Bear-Able
programme.desc: Murrays tvilsomme fortid avsløres endelig. Husets sterkeste og rareste par konfronterer sitt første eks-hinder. Janelle får se konsekvensene av sine handlinger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: How to Keep a Man 101
programme.desc: Chad og Nicoles situasjon forverrer seg når en annen eks kommer og tilfører dramaet kaos. En hjemmefest gjør en annen eks kjempesjalu.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ghost of Relationship's Past
programme.desc: Nicole blir sjalu når Maddie sier noe skandaløst. Et gjenferd fra gamle forhold kommer for å ta havn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Bad Bromance
programme.desc: Angelas verste mareritt blir sant da et eks skylles opp på stranden. Chad håndterer konsekvensen av Nicoles handlinger. En skvett truer med å bryte husets sterkeste bromace.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ex-Viction Notice
programme.desc: Shack of Secrets lander på to uheldige omstendigheter. Angela må svare for seg og Nurys må fatte en viktig avgjørelse. Eksene står overfor en overraskende eliminasjon.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ex, Lies, and Polygraph Tape
programme.desc: Farrah er tilbake og finner en gang for alle ut at hun har kommet over eksen. Sannheten avsløres da en løgndetektor-test tvinger huset til å ta en ærlig titt på forholdene sine.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Reunion Del 1
programme.desc: Etter en turbulent sesong, gjenforenes sigler og ekser for første gang for et oppkok av de største forbindelsene, bruddene og bedragene. Ensemblet avslører om de stadig er forelsket, eller valgte å si til helvete med den da sesongen sluttet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Reunion Del 2
programme.desc: Dramatikken fortsetter i den overraskende del 2 i Ex on the Beach Reunion. Løgndetektoren tvinger Morgan til å innrømme sannheten. En helt ny forbindelse avsløres og utroskaps skandaler avdekkes.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Welcome to the Peak
programme.desc: Ti realitekjendiser ankommer vinterlandskapet for å se om de kan finne sin neste for minglesesongen. Hva de ikke vet er at eksene deres kommer til å styrte inn som et snøskred.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Winter Un-Wonderland
programme.desc: Eksene til Callum og Nicole forårsaker skikkelig trøbbel i huset. En kjærlighetsforbindelse oppstår for et par og brytes raskt for et annet. En ny eks ankommer og den første 'Hot Date' blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Caught Red Velvet Handed
programme.desc: Daniel gjør et klossete forsøk på en kjærlighetsforbindelse. Varmen stiger i "Sauna of Secrets" for en utro singel. Den første eksen ises ut av sommrhuset.

programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Esmerelda's Pontiac Sunbird.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Terese's Ford LTD Crown Victoria Station Wagon.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Amber's Chevy Cavalier.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Louis' Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
