programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school
programme.sub-title: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: På treningsleirens tredje uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Hår og sminke blir piffet opp når de blir støpt i DCC-formen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Portrettfotografering
programme.desc: Kveldens øvelser begynner med et smell da teknisk sjef for DCC, Kitty Carter, kommer på overraskende besøk til Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Finale
programme.desc: Alt fører frem til treningsleirens avsluttende finalekveld. I kveld fødes og knuses drømmer. Kelli overrasker jentene ved å ta dem til Cowboys' øvingsfelt for å se dem opptre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Innledende prøvedansing
programme.desc: Under to timer vises sesongpremieren av Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: 600 håpefulle kandidater vil være med på laget, og ankommer Cowboys' stadion for Dallas Cowboys' heiagjengs innledende prøvedansing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleir
programme.desc: Treningsleiren starter og mange nye kandidater må bli rotløse og flytte til Dallas. Imidlertid er det ingen garanti for å klare treningsleiren og bli med i Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Splitthopp
programme.desc: Det er bare andre uke med øvelser, og Kelli og Judy kjører raskt kandidatene gjennom signaturbevegelsene. Mange nye kandidater har aldri foretatt et splitthopp, og uerfarenheten gjør at visse blir skadet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens fjerde uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Kelli Finglass sumfarer nye frisyrer og et sminkeprogram som skal gi jentene DCC-stilen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Femte uke
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens femte uke er Kelly uvel. Teknisk sjef Kitty Carter, stiller opp og kjører ukens første øvelser. Kitty praktiserer nulltoleranse og tilkaller de som har rotete numre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Treningsleirens syvende uke begynner med en øvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Kelli og Judy er klare for den endelige prøven, og kveldens omgang kan bestemme hvem som når laget..

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Kunngjøring av laget
programme.desc: Det er på tide å kunngjøre DCC-laget, men først skal Kelli og Judy teste kandidatene i en endelig feltøvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Spenningen stiger blant jentene, og Kelli og Judy betrakter hvert eneste trinn.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: En stor prestasjon
programme.desc: Laget har sin første kampdagopptreden bakom seg, men etter en dårlig øvelse advarer Kelli sitt nye lag om at hun kommer til å droppe de som ikke gir hundre prosent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Badedraktkalender
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders tar pause fra sidelinjen, og drar til Mexico for bilder til sin årlige badedraktkalender. Det er en utmattende uke for både jentene og armadaen av fotografer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Første hjemmekamp
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng er i fullt dansemodus og forbereder seg for sesongens første ordinære hjemmekamp. Kelli og Judy vil ha koreografien perfekt og presse jentene med intense øveldser.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: I seriens siste episode, forbereder Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng seg for entréopptredenen sin - Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show - under en nasjonalt overført Cowboys' footballkamp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Drømmer står på spill når uttaket til 2013-2014 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders innledes. Når portene åpnes og 500 jenter stimer inn, er den spenningen til å ta og føle på. Konkurransen kommer til å være steinhard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Return of the Vets
programme.desc: Presset er enormt når 54 nye kandidater konkurrerer mot 32 veteraner om en invitasjon til den berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Pressure to Perform
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner i Cowboys berømte treningslokaler, Valley Ranch. Det første møtet er fullt av spenning og energi til Kelli kaller inn til spesialmøte med veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Harsh Reality
programme.desc: "Treningsleirens skumleste kveld" innledes med en dramatisk hendelse når jentene lærer de fryktede hoppspagatene. Det er bare å kjempe seg gjennom for jentene som prøver seg på det berømte og nødvendige trinnet.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Doctor Carson’s caseload also includes Wayne, who was found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs, and 4-year-old Pippa who’s been brought in with severe sickness.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. And for the casualty team those no letup in the blue light arrivals. Carole is rushed in after being found collapsed outside her home.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: It’s all change at Barnsley Casualty as a new system is introduced. Sister Benita is taking on the role of Team Leader for the first time, ‘Being in charge is nice,’ says Benita.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: The department is full and waiting time to see a doctor has doubled but ambulances are still bringing in critically ill patients.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: Nurse Chloe treats 88-year-old Enid, who has been knocked over by high-speed winds and has a severe open head wound. She needs to assess Enid quickly in case she’s suffered from a head trauma.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Chris Young meets his first patient of the day, 76-year-old Mavis, who is in a critical condition having been hit by a car. She has potential life-threatening injuries all over her body, so the team work quickly to assess the damage.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Last year, 1 in 7 NHS workers were physically abused and today is no different as much-loved health Care assistant Kerry is physically attacked by a patient she was trying to help.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: 70-year-old Fred is blue-lighted in having suffered a serious fall at home. With a shortage of doctors in the department, he’s taken straight for an urgent x-ray after which he’s transferred to the care of Dr Tom Hawthorne.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs but all need the care of doctors and nurses - whatever their issues.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: When a key member of staff calls in sick at the last minute, Sister Rachael’s dream of smooth shift disappears. She must manage a department overflowing with patients, struggling with staff shortages, with longer waiting times and no available beds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Every bed in the department is occupied but there are still 20 patients waiting for the next one to be vacated. Lead Nurse Steph is already struggling to manage the mounting number of patients when the emergency alarm sounds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: It’s another grueling shift for team at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department. Juggling a backlog of walk-in patients and a constant stream of new ambulance emergencies, they’re struggling to keep waiting times down.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Today, the pace at Barnsley Casualty is relentless; other hospitals in the area are full and as a result, ambulances are being diverted to Barnsley. In one of them is 17-year-old Alex who has had a fit after falling from his bike..

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: Sister Rachel is running the shift and she’s under pressure with a shortage of cubicles. To make matters worse, IT systems start to fail across the hospital causing chaos for patient flow.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: In the London suburb of Enfield, former workaholic Sandra has become a hoard-aholic since retiring. Her compulsion to spend is out of control, and everything is added to the growing mountains of books, clothes and candles…

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of American born dog loving Dani from Shepton Mallet who moved to the UK with high hopes of living the English Country dream, but bad health got the better of her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Eco warrior Karen from Somerset, who after many years of living off grid in a caravan, has struggled to adapt to living in, and looking after, a house.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 8
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Pippa and Matt from Oxford who have 6 kids all living in a 3-bedroom house. With both parents working full time, the house has taken a back seat for many years.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 6
programme.desc: In South Wales, 49-year-old Alison has always been a hoarder. What started as a passion for teddy bears has transformed into an obsession for. She currently has 11 and they rule the house, at least the bits they can get to in between the hoard…

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 8
programme.desc: 79-year-old Joyce moved into her dream home in Liverpool nearly 40 years ago with her partner, Norman. But when he passed away, she lost her battle to keep on top of the hoarding behavior she inherited from her mum.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: Crouch Ops Rob and Lee race to the scene of a horrific traffic collision where a van has slid out of control on a country lane and landed on top of a car. With the car wedged underneath the van, the recovery team is faced with a complex challenge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve and the team are called out to upright an artic that's rolled over on the A1. With rush hour fast approaching, the boys need to raise the heavyweight payload before they cause traffic mayhem.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Crane Operator Nick cannot find a 4x4 that has taken the term 'off road' to another level on the busy A10 and is buried on its side in a water-filled ditch. Once it's discovered he is forced to stop his truck in a live lane to winch it out.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Recovery op Tez has to fly to a job. After a birdstrike, a 44-ton artic needs rescuing from the side of the busy A1 dual carriageway, one of the UK's deadliest roads. Double act, Stig and Lee need to shift a totaled tractor with a busted axle.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve is sent to coordinate a recovery on the Northbound A1 after a collision that has closed both lanes. With a Bin Lorry on its side in a ditch and a truck pulling a refrigerated container rolled over, this is a major job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: On the M1, Crouch incident manager, Steve, and his team face a massive task trying to recover a 26-ton lorry that careened off the motorway, catapulted across a 6-foot ditch, broke through a fence, and landed a shocking 30 meters from the road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Steve and the team attempt to rescue an enormous rubble truck that's tipped over in a ditch. Forced to close the road they're up against the clock, but having to work in the dark is making the job a lot more precarious.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Stig is called out to an oil tanker stuck in the mud in the middle of an isolated farm track. Stig is forced to reverse his massive truck through the surrounding tiny lanes to try and reach the stranded truck from the other side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam when they recover a parcel lorry that has taken the term 'stuck in the post' to another level. They have the risky job of getting it shifted before rush hour begins.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A delivery truck's in hot water, cab first into a pond, and its recovery ops Sean and Michael in at the deep end, figuring out how to extract a 38-ton delivery lorry from its watery grave.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A tipper truck has spun 180 degrees and slid down a steep motorway embankment. The job calls for a five-man team, 2 trucks, and a crane. Lee faces his biggest fear trying to locate a remote yard, before coming face to face with a stranded school bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Recovery driver Sean is faced with a thorny problem when he tries to recover an SUV that's skidded on black ice and ended up 20 feet down a ditch, wedged in dense shrubbery.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Stig is called to the hard shoulder of the M45 to help a scrap truck with a broken wheel bearing. This is a tough job even for a man of Stig's abilities as he deals with the job next to the live lane of the motorway with his usual grace and charm.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Merrie pitches up at a golf course to rescue a tanker that has landed its very own hole in one, but before she even arrives, a second tanker goes off course and suffers the same fate. But she's in danger of getting stuck herself.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: A truck full of gravel rolls into a farmer's field. Steve and the team get in a jam as they try to get it out. Soft ground and the angle the truck is resting at mean they can't clear the gravel out, making it dangerous and unpredictable to lift.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: A lorry containing vital medical supplies has been involved in a collision with another truck on a busy A road in Leicestershire – Tez, Buzz, and colleagues Dan and Moz have to get the medical truck back on the road as quickly as possible.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Rescue Op Tez has a stinker of a job getting a bin lorry out of a ditch. After calling for backup and asking the bin lorry's mechanic to assist, Tez puts all his might behind winching the heavy lorry out of danger.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Crouch op Stig fears for his safety and needs assistance when he's called to rescue a refrigerated lorry that careered off the road on a blind bend of the notoriously busy A47.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Buzz is sent to rescue a double-decker artic marooned at the junction of a busy roundabout. Danny's day starts badly when the windscreen on his truck is smashed by a stone.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 603
programme.desc: Politiet har ikke gitt opp å oppklare dobbeltdrapet i Linköping. Etter en endring i svensk lov i 2019, har politiet nå muligheten til å bruke kommersielle slektsdatabaser for å finne gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 605
programme.desc: Den 12. juni 2017 blir et eldre par funnet brutalt drept på deres gård utenfor Mantorp. Viktige brikker i puslespillet i jakten på morderen viser seg å være teiprester, så vel som usedvanlig store skoavtrykk.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake & King
programme.desc: Jake tends to mind his owner Bob but goes crazy to protect Bob’s wife Linda. At the same time, all of 10 year old Chantel’s might is hardly enough for 150 pound King to even take notice.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: J & Alice
programme.desc: J is unpredictable and aggressive and his owner is now dealing with a lawsuit. Alice is depressed and aggressive towards the other two dogs in the house – a potentially lethal combination.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caper & Julius
programme.desc: Caper has a lot of energy, particularly when it comes to chasing down balls non-stop. Julius is a four-year-old Pit Bull mix that is frightened of everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nicki
programme.desc: Nicky, a 4-year old black Rottweiler, suffered terribly in his youth. His new owner has given him a loving home. However, there are a few old habits he can’t shake, including dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Stewart & Buddy
programme.desc: Stewart, a Chow/Golden Retriever mix, barks and growls at and seems to be fearful and aggressive toward children. Every time Johnny turns on the hose, Buddy the Beagle runs for the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lucy & Lizzie
programme.desc: Lucy the Dalmatian snarls at larger dogs then turns in circles and attacks her own tail. Lizzie, a Red Tick Elizabethan Beagle, is obsessed with running, inside or outside.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Teddy, and Matilda
programme.desc: Lab/Staffordshire mix unfriendly to small animals; a poodle that can't stop running in circles; bulldog obsessed with attaching skateboard wheels.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren
programme.desc: A Min Pin turns ferocious. Actress Denise Richards' pug gets overprotective and aggressive towards visitors. A stubborn Bassett Hound has to literally be dragged places he doesn't want to go.
programme.sub-title: Chip, Leo, Hank, Lucy and Betty

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Spike, Jake & Nugget, and Wendel
programme.desc: A wedding date is cancelled because the dogs can't get along; a German Shepherd that's so aggressive, even the German Shepherd rescue center won't take him; Sheltie barks at everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eppie, Lady, and Snoopy
programme.desc: A Beagle with a passion for boogie boarding, a Dalmatian/German shepherd dangerously protective of her owner; Lab/Beagle mix that became aggressive after moving to a new area.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete på jord 2006
programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Den ustoppelige
programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Walk Slowly
programme.desc: Following Catherine's death on the rooftop, Vincent takes her back to her apartment and leaves her on her bed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nevermore
programme.desc: Vincent has begun his quest to find his son and makes his first move by revealing himself to Elliot.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Snow
programme.desc: The man who killed Catherine and took her baby sends an assassin to get Vincent. He manages to find the underground world and goes looking for him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour
programme.desc: A teacher on a violent and gang-infested high school has trouble controlling her students/A Vietnam vet named Billy saves an old man named Gaspar from a mugging at a cemetery.
programme.sub-title: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Act Break/The Burning Man/Dealer's Choice
programme.desc: Landlord pesters Maury, whose partner dies. Maury wishes for Shakespeare as partner, travels back in time/Woman encounters odd hitchhiker/Poker game newcomer raises suspicion with repeated card draws.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: Tight-fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. airbase in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Wong's Lost and Found Emporium
programme.desc: David Wong searches for something he lost. He seeks the Lost and Found Emporium where he finds others looking for their lost items.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Woman's Shoes
programme.desc: Shy Maddie finds a pair of shoes and after trying them on is possessed by the vengeful spirit of a rich murdered woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day
programme.desc: Boy finds solace in deal with Shadow Man/Video tricks bewilder parents/Lovers plot in Twilight Zone, facing ironic twist.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mirror Image
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty
programme.desc: Physician stranded in wary village/Gus Rosenthal revisits past, meets younger self. Guiding him, Gus realizes mistakes.
programme.sub-title: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star
programme.desc: Store Santa redefines Christmas for owner/Secretary finds alternate universe revering her job/Starship discovers Bethlehem's star and ancient civilization's remains.
programme.sub-title: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Big Tall Wish
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Nice Place to Visit
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie
programme.desc: Dan finds mystic photos in antique camera/Irishman's leprechaun tales turn real/Critic's end foretold by fortune cookies.
programme.sub-title: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes
programme.desc: Young monster fan meets alleged vampire neighbor/Alien threatens humanity, nations rush disarmament/Couple finds empty street with strange workers.
programme.sub-title: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare as a Child
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Chaser
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Passage for Trumpet
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Fear Strikes Up A Conversation
programme.desc: Public speaking seems like a breeze for Sabrina after coming face-to-face with her fears in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Disney World
programme.desc: A school trip to Disneyworld becomes yet another test for Sabrina on the road to her witch's license

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Choice
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Rumor Mill
programme.desc: Gossip flies when Sabrina does witch community service in the Other Realm rumor mill.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Mom vs. Magic (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina faces the most difficult decision of her life when she must choose between her mom and her magic

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It’s a Mad Mad Mad Mad (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns she has to solve the family secret before she can use her Witches License.
programme.sub-title: It’s a Mad Mad Mad Mad (Season Premiere)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Boy Was My Face Red
programme.desc: An embarrassing moment leaves Sabrina red in the face.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey and Libby are paired together for a school project.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Pom-Pom Incident
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions go bad when she prevents Valerie from trying out for the cheerleading squad.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Pancake Madness
programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Good Will Haunting
programme.desc: Halloween turns truly frightful when a demented doll takes charge of the festivities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Bet Your Family
programme.desc: Salem’s gambling debts get the best of him, but its Sabrina and her aunts who pay the price.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To
programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rogue
programme.desc: As the lowest-ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG: The Colonel's Wife
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG: Boomerang (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG: People V. Gunny
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG: The Bridge At Kang So Ri
programme.desc: Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.
programme.sub-title: The Bridge At Kang So Ri

programme.title: JAG: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG: Real Deal Seal
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG: Overdue And Presumed Lost
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG: A Separate Peace-Part 1
programme.desc: A few days before his promotion to the command of the Sixth Fleet, RAdm Boone, an old acquaintance of Harmon Rabb, Sr.reminisces with Cmdr Harmon Harm Rabb, Jr. about the Vietnam war. Their conversation is interrupted by SECNAV who bears shocking news.

programme.title: JAG: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG: To Walk on Wings
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Past Tense
programme.desc: Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: JAG: Guilt
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: JAG: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG: Ambush
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gx-1
programme.desc: Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack in the Box
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver: Widowmaker
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hell Week
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blow Out
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver: Kill Zone
programme.desc: MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver: Early Retirement
programme.desc: After an accident forces Pete Thornton to retire from the foundation, MacGyver suspects foul play within the organization and uncovers a plot to assassinate a visiting Third World Leader.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Odd Triple
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: MacGyver: Thin Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Negotiator
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Spoilers (Aka "Earthquake")
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the rescue of a mountain man who has been framed for murder after agreeing to testify against a chemical company that is illegally disposing of hazardous materials in nearby streams.

programme.title: MacGyver: Mask of the Wolf
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rock and Cradle
programme.desc: An abandoned baby lands MacGyver and Jack Dalton in the middle of a sophisticated counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Endangered
programme.desc: After visiting an old flame who's now working as a Park Ranger, MacGyver finds himself in the middle of a grizzly poaching investigation.

programme.title: MacGyver: Murderer's Sky
programme.desc: MacGyver protects a 14-year-old from the mob after his grandfather is killed for refusing to sell out his international shipping company.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Secret Of Parker House
programme.desc: MacGyver and old friend Penny Parker uncover a skeleton on the grounds of a mansion inherited by Penny, and MacGyver works to solve a year-old mystery regarding the disappearance of Penny's aunt.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: While visiting his hometown, MacGyver is forced to recall a painful incident from his past when he comes to the aid of a young boy involved in a shooting.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Outsiders
programme.desc: MacGyver is forced to settle a dispute between the Amish and some land developers after an accident threatens the lives of two children.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Det femte og siste samarbeidet mellom John Wayne og regissør Howard Hawks er en actionfyllt western som finner sted etter borgerkrigen, der en gruppe menn leter etter unionsforræderne som er ansvarlige for en rekke togran.

programme.title: The Lonely Trail
programme.desc: After serving with the Union army, John Wayne returns home to be recruited by the governor of Texas to rid the state of crooked carpetbaggers.

programme.title: The High And The Mighty
programme.desc: John Wayne spiller Dan Roman, en veteranpilot som hjemsøkes av en tragisk fortid. Nå er han henvist til å være nestkommanderende i cockpiten, og blir satt opp på en rutineflyvning fra Honolulu til San Francisco - en flyvning som tar en skremmende vending.

programme.title: Sands Of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: Three Faces West
programme.desc: A Viennese physician and his daughter, refugees from Hitler, become part of a group of North Dakota townspeople planning to relocate from the dust bowl to greener Oregon.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo er en kavalerist som blir Angie sin beskytter og en farsfigur til hennes sønn. Angie venter bestemt på at mannen hennes skal komme hjem og nekter å forlate gården deres til tross for den økende faren. Filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Hatari!
programme.desc: Regissør Howard Hawks slår seg sammen med John Wayne igjen, som leder en gruppe svært flinke jegere i Afrika. Men de bruker ikke kuler - de fanger de blodtørstige dyrene med sterke tau og kameraer for dyrehager og sirkusattraksjoner.

programme.title: Red River Range
programme.desc: The cattlemen's organization calls upon the Three Mesquiteers to pose as outlaws to round up cattle thieves who cleverly cover their tracks and vanish.
