programme.desc: Fotballunderholdning for fans! Se dokumentarer, originalserier og utvalgte direktesendte kamper samt historiske øyeblikk fra FIFA World Cup:tm:, FIFA Club World Cup:tm:, FIFA Women's World Cup:tm: og mer.

programme.title: 1998 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Fotballunderholdning for fans! Se dokumentarer, originalserier og utvalgte direktesendte kamper samt historiske øyeblikk fra FIFA World Cup:tm:, FIFA Club World Cup:tm:, FIFA Women's World Cup:tm: og mer.

programme.title: South Park: Heia Gud XII
programme.desc: Cartman fryser seg ned og våkner opp 500 år inn i fremtiden.

programme.title: South Park: Lusningen
programme.desc: Cartman vil finne kilden til et luseutbrudd på skolen, så han kan gjøre narr av ham.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Hyllusinasjoner
programme.desc: De hysteriske foreldrene i South Park får enda en grunn til panikk når 'cheesing' blir poplært blant barna.

programme.title: South Park: Utlogget
programme.desc: Forvirring og panikk råder da Internett blir borte i South Park!

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Kaptein Tjukkskjegg
programme.desc: Cartman har hørt om alle de rikdommene som blir plyndret av pirater i Somalia, så han setter en lapp over øyet og sleper gjengen med til Afrika for å få en bit av kaka.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Etterpåklokskap
programme.desc: Superhelten 'The Coon' er tilbake og denne gangen har han venner!

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Vulkanen
programme.desc: Guttene drar på jakt med Stans gale onkel Jimbo, uvitende om at fjellet de er på er en vulkan på nippet til å bryte ut.

programme.title: South Park: Døden
programme.desc: Stans bestefar prøver å lure guttene til å drepe ham. Foreldrene i South Park prøver å få stanset sendingene av 'Terrance and Phillip'.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Selvantenning
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park begynner å eksplodere uten forvarsel. Stans far tar saken.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Datakalenderen
programme.desc: Cartman skryter av sin nye Trapper Keeper, men en fremmed forteller ham at den snart vil ta over verden om de ikke ødelegger den nå.

programme.title: South Park: Det helsprø antastningseventyret
programme.desc: Kyle ringer politiet for å si at foreldrene har forgrepet seg på ham. Snart har alle barna anmeldt foreldrene, til det bare er barn igjen i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete bryter løs
programme.desc: 'Du vet hva' er løs da innbyggerne i South Park hører banning i en populær TV-serie.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: Guttene er oppslukt av Stans nye spillkonsoll. Mens de spiller, begynner håndkledet Towelie å snakke til dem.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Kaos
programme.desc: Gutta gir Butters sparken som venn og vekker hans mørke side.

programme.title: South Park: Kidnapping er ikke gøy
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett for mye på TV blir Tweek overbevist om at barn ikke er trygge og at han kommer til å bli kidnappet.

programme.title: South Park: Grått daggry
programme.desc: Pensjonistene mister førerkortene etter å ha skapt kaos i gatene. Stans bestefar søker hjelp hos pensjonistforeningen AARP.

programme.title: South Park: Slimfolk
programme.desc: South Park blir oversvømmet av arbeidere fra fremtiden som jobber for lavere lønn. Mennene i South Park tyr til overraskende midler for å stoppe dem.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Bestevenner for alltid
programme.desc: Cartmans blir sjalu når Kenny får det siste nye bærbare spillet før lekebutikkene går tomme. Vil Cartman og Kenny kunne forbli bestevenner for alltid?

programme.title: South Park: Se opp for de selvgode!
programme.desc: South Parks innbyggere kjøper hybridbiler, men idet folk begynner å føle seg fornøyde fordi de redder verden, samler en mørk sky seg over byen.

programme.title: South Park: Kjærlighet, ikke Warcraft
programme.desc: Guttene har spilt World of Warcraft en hel helg da en annen spiller dreper dem uten tegn på anger.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Heia Gud
programme.desc: Cartman prøver å reise til fremtiden for å kjøpe et nytt dataspill.

programme.title: South Park: Heia Gud XII
programme.desc: Cartman fryser seg ned og våkner opp 500 år inn i fremtiden.

programme.title: South Park: Lusningen
programme.desc: Cartman vil finne kilden til et luseutbrudd på skolen, så han kan gjøre narr av ham.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Top Gear-gutta bygger tøffe og interessante bobiler før de setter kursen mot Sørvest-England for en langhelg.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Fords Transit-van feirer sitt jubileum på Nürburgringen, og ukens stjerne i en billigbil er rockestjernen Justin Hawkins.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Teamet legger ut på en roadtrip på tvers av USA i biler kjøpt for under USD 1000, og takler en rekke utfordringer på veien.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Teamet deltar i det 24 timer lange billøpet Britcar. De tester også en Daihatsu Materia mot en Ascari A1+, og konkurrerer mot BMX-syklister.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: En bil kappkjører med et fly og en annen kappkjører med en bobsleigh, mens en Renault får en Formel 1-fartstest. Ukens gjest er Eddie Izzard.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Richard Hammond blir etterlatt i villmarken i Canada for å teste en klokke med en innebygd nødsender.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: De to siste filmene som ble laget for den seneste serien. Jeremy, Richard og James kaster seg inn i livsstilen til klassiske bilentusiaster.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: I den første episoden tar Evans og LeBlanc en temmelig våt kjøretur til Blackpool i et par Reliant trehjulinger uten tak.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Gutta arrangerer et race fra Wembley til San Siro i Milano. Jeremy kjører en Shelby Mustang GT500, og Richard og James reiser med tog.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May forsøker å finne ut om du kan drive motorsport for mindre enn det koster å spille golf. Slash og F1-fører Kimi Raikkonen er gjester.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Teamet prøver å kjøpe en skikkelig italiensk superbil for under ti tusen pund, og Dame Ellen MacArthur er ukens kjendis i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: James kjører opp en aktiv vulkan på Island i en Toyota Hilux, og Richard gir Chevrolet Lacettien en verdig avskjed.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gutta er i Russland og kappkjører på tvers av det enorme og svært vakre urbane landskapet i St. Petersburg.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Del 2 av 2. Trioen har overlevd intens trafikk, livsfarlige leirskred og heller tvilsom kartlesing, og når høydepunktet på reisen for å finne Nilens utspring.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jeremy og Richard prøver å skape en bil for de eldre, og James tester en ny Range Rover.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Storbritannias fremste motorshow, med utfordringer, vurderinger og kjendisgjester.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia er desperat etter å starte gruvedriften, men brutale veiforhold får henne til å tvile på om mannskapet i det hele tatt vil ankomme stedet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mens Guy og Gary desperat forsøker å fikse den ødelagte veien til stedet, håper Claudia at en ny medarbeider vil bringe den flaksen hun sårt trenger.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robins overraskende handletur stresser Claudia når innkjøpsfeil setter gruvedriften på vent.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia prøver å bevare freden når Robin og hennes far krangler, mens mannskapet sliter med å fikse det ene problemet etter det andre på gruvebilen deres.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og Josh frustreres av flere sammenbrudd, mens Claudia kommer med en sjokkerende kunngjøring som spolerer Robins planer og forårsaker konflikt mellom paret.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået øker over mellom Robin, Josh og Steve om hvordan de skal grave. Når Claudia trer inn blir stemningen enda mer opphetet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Med store lastebilproblemer kjemper Robin og mannskapet hans for å få unnagjort et skift før drivstoffet går tomt.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin krangler med Claudia og Josh om kvaliteten på jaden i gropen deres, mens Larrys forsøk på å frakte mannskapets sovebrakke til leiren går skeis.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Dårlige bremser, slitte nerver og vanskelige kjøreforhold får Claudia til å tvile på om mannskapet klarer å frakte den store sovebrakken til leiren i ett sett.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia og teamet er fast bestemt på å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for skogbranner som herjer rundt området deres, inntil situasjonen forverres og de må evakuere.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter å ha mistet to ukers gruvedrift til skogbrannene tar Claudia og Robin risikoen med å returnere til Two Mile for å åpne en ny gruve.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia stresser med å få klargjøre den beste jaden klar for kjøpere, mens mannskapets moral blir testet når de kjemper mot kulden og endelig begynner å skjære opp 90 tonns steinen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia gjør alt i sin makt for å selge til potensielle kjøpere, mens oppe i gruven sliter Guy og Gary med sesongens første snøstorm.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia presser mannskapet til å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for frysetemperaturer og stadig vanskeligere veiforhold.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudias sesong starter med et smell da hun mottar en ordre på $250,000 for en jade.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter flere år med dårlige avtaler med Scrappy Larry lurer Robin sin gamle venn.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Under presset til å møte en kjøpers stramme tidsfrist kolliderer Robin og Josh da de trøbler med å sette opp wiresagen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Når et stort sammenbrudd truer med å stenge gruven tar Claudia og Robin en risikabel beslutning om å skaffe sårt tiltrengt drivstoff til leiren.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Josh unngår så vidt katastrofe når han kjører inn i gruven med et last drivstoff, og Claudia er knust når en jadeplate sprekker i to mens hun kjører den under sagen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia og Robin prøver desperat å finne en ny jadestein før kjøperen trekker seg, men de går snart tom for tid og alternativer.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia henvender seg til sin far Steve for hjelp da hun frykter at det største salget i hennes gruvekarriere er i ferd med å glippe.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået øker mellom Claudia, Robin og Josh når de gjør et siste forsøk på å inngå en avtale med en kjøper fra Vietnam.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Flytting av en massiv jadeplate setter både gruvens gamle utstyr og Josh' tålmodighet på prøve.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Transporten av en 20 tonns stein på den farlige veien ut av gruven viser seg å være for mye for den gamle lastebilen 6-Pack.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin oppdager en stor jadelinse på Two Mile, men det kan vise seg vanskelig for den lille operasjonen deres å grave den ut.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Når en høyst uvanlig august snøstorm fanger Claudia og Robin på Two Mile prøver Gary og Garon å redde dagen ved å kjøre gjennom stormen for å bringe forsyninger.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin tar en tøff beslutning om sin kjære gruvebil 6 Pack etter nok et kostbart sammenbrudd.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Vinteren nærmer seg og Claudia presser sitt utslitte mannskap til bristepunktet, noe som får temperamentet til å blusse opp og tvinger Claudia til endelig å ta en for laget.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Den nye gruvesesongen er full av ubehagelige overraskelser, men en usannsynlig redning redder dagen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Josh er lei av å jobbe for sin egen far og starter sin egen transportvirksomhet med en ny Semi.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Den militære lastebilen faller om på den brutale veien til gruven.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og sønnen redder en gammel militærlastebil, men å kjøre den opp til gruven viser seg å være vanskelig.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Garon og Josh mister kontrollen over Six Pack på de gjørmete veiene.

programme.title: Matlock: The View
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock: The Play
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Matlock: The Capital Offense
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Haunted (Part 1)
programme.desc: Against Matlock’s approval, his associate, Cliff Lewis, advertises for a private client. He is hired by a flaky woman who becomes the main suspect in the murder of the plastic surgeon she sued.

programme.title: Matlock: The Kidnapping (Part 1)
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to kidnap Matlock’s daughter, the kidnappers take Matlock’s friend instead! Matlock tries to track down his friend, meanwhile, he’s asked to investigate the kidnapping of an eight-year-old boy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Temptation
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Matlock: The Crook
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDanielsturns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Matlock: The Murder Game
programme.desc: Amidst the beauty of a luxurious island mansion, a mystery game for charity quickly evolves into a puzzling murder when Matlock discovers the victim is really dead!

programme.title: Matlock: Brennan
programme.desc: A budding friendship between two great lawyers blossoms into animosity when Matlock and District Attorney Brennen square off on a murder trial. Not only does Matlock believe in his client’s innocence, he thinks Brennen might be the one who’s guilty!

programme.title: Matlock: The Pi
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock: The Scandal
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock: The Tabloid
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: Deadly Dose
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Target
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Matlock: The Judge
programme.desc: Judge kills mistress.

programme.title: Matlock: The Stripper
programme.desc: A stripper is accused of killing her ex-husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Affair (Aka "The Maid")
programme.desc: A maid is accused of killing an employer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Seduction (Aka "The Quarterback")
programme.desc: A football star is accused of killing the owner of his team.

programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Kravene heves
programme.desc: Cartman innrømmer endelig at han er feit og får umiddelbart en permobil.

programme.title: South Park: Hobbiten
programme.desc: Wendy prøver å pare en av sine venninner med Butters, men hun ender opp på kontoret til skolekuratoren.

programme.title: South Park: #Oppkok
programme.desc: Kyle vil bare spille tv-spill med lillebroren sin. Men da Ike vil ikke spille med ham mer, blir Kyle redd for at neste generasjon vil forbigå ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Fabuløs og modig
programme.desc: Gutta viser Caitlyn Jenner sin enormt store respekt i det mest fabuløse og modige 'South Park'-avsnittet noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Chefs salte sjokoladeboller
programme.desc: Chef får ikke solgt karamellene sine på en filmfestival, så han går over til salte sjokoladeballer og lager en reklamesang.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Verdens største blokkfløytekonsert
programme.desc: Klassen skal spille på en blokkfløytekonsert i Mr Garrisons hjemby i Arkansas, og forsøker å finne den mystiske 'brune lyden'.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.
programme.sub-title: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway-brødrene
programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.title: South Park: Butter slår tilbake
programme.desc: Butters blir i hemmelighet plaget av sin bestemor og Stan ønsker å øke bevisstheten om farene ved mobbing. Stans idé er å spille inn en stor dansevideo, men suksessen raskt går til hodet på ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glutenfri ebola
programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Du yelper ikke til
programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Personal grievances get in the way of detective Harry Trumble's retirement party. Trumble never forgave Dr. Sloan for marrying his college sweetheart and dedicated his life to his work.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.
programme.sub-title: Today Is The Last Day Of The Rest Of My Life

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.desc: Bli med på high-stakes poker med Triton Poker, ditt vindu inn til de mest prestisjefylte pokerseriene i verden. Se elitespillere i direkte spill døgnet rundt med sendinger fra hver eneste turnering gjennom hele året.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie finds herself being audited by IRS agent Jimmy Callahan she misconstrues his friendly manner for amorous interest.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline's young boyfriend Joe declares his undying love for her, she realizes that she is not ready for the level of commitment that Joe arrived at so quickly.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guy Who Gets There Too Soon

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.desc: The final round of the 2023 Sentry Tournament of Champions, where Justin Thomas won in a three-hole playoff to claim his 12th PGA TOUR victory.

programme.desc: Watch the final round of The Sentry in 2025, from the Plantation Course at Kapalua.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus
programme.desc: Alle guttene blir sjalu da Cartman påstår at han har kommet i puberteten. Jesus lover South Parks innbyggere en spektakulær nyttårsfeiring.
programme.sub-title: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En svært elendig jul
programme.desc: Kyle og Ike venter i spenning på Mr. Hankey. Når han ikke kommer, innkaller Kyle de andre til krisemøte.

programme.title: South Park: Rød slede nedskutt
programme.desc: Med julenissens, herr Hankeys og Jesus sin hjelp, forsøker Cartman å bringe julen til Iraks underkuete befolkning.

programme.title: South Park: Det er jul i Kanada
programme.desc: Kyles adoptivbror Ike blir hentet av sine biologiske foreldre fordi den kanadiske statsministeren har bestemt at alle bortadopterte kanadiske barn må returnere til landet.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul
programme.desc: Julenissen må drepe alle onde dyr i South Park og redde verden etter at Stan narres til å hjelpe dem med fødselen til frelseren deres.

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial
programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Black Friday
programme.desc: Gutta forbereder seg på å slåss mot andre kunder på første dag i julehandelen.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Julesnø
programme.desc: Julenissen dreper all glede under julefeiringen i byen.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: I en reklamepause under 'Terrance and Phillip' bestemmer guttene seg for å adoptere et etiopisk barn for å få en gratis klokke.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: God jul, Charlie Manson!
programme.desc: Onkel Howard rømmer fra fengsel sammen med Charlie Manson, som er klar til å nyte friheten, men blir distrahert av et juleprogram.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin i verdensrommet
programme.desc: Marvin er tilbake! Han og guttene reiser verden rundt for å finne mat, med CIA og Sally Struthers hakk i hæl.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankeys juleklassikere
programme.desc: Denne spesialepisoden har numre fra Mr. Hankey's Christmas Collection Album.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: On the Oche

programme.title: The Darts Swap Challenge
programme.desc: Featuring Jonny Clayton, Joe Cullen, Fallon Sherrock and More!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Henry Deacon talks with the youngest ever Super Series player Archie Self, making waves since Luke Littler.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Beau Greaves and Fallon Sherrock
programme.desc: Laura Turner analyses the throws of two top female competitors in the game, Beau Greaves and Fallon Sherrock.

programme.title: Life After Darts - Glen Durrant and Paul Nicholson
programme.desc: Glen Durrant and Paul Nicholson discuss life after darts, reflecting on their journey beyond the oche.

programme.title: The Best of Leonard Gates: Top Moments & Highlights
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: An Audience with Phil Taylor & Adrian Lewis
programme.desc: Join Phil Taylor & Adrian Lewis for an intimate Q&A at the Live Lounge sharing their best moments and memories.

programme.title: George Noble: The Final Call
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: Break of Throw: Spotting and Counting
programme.desc: Owen Binks explains spotting and counting, guided by players' complex preferred routes and throwing styles.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Movers and Shakers
programme.desc: Matthew Edgar analyses the quirky oche movements of Wes Newton and Carl Wilson and how they aid their game.

programme.title: MODUS Moments: Scots on the Oche
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Teammates become rivals as players from the same nation face off in a bullseye battle.
programme.sub-title: International Pairs Week Bullseye Challenge: Teammates Face Off

programme.title: Murph Meets
programme.desc: Chris Murphy meets Bobby George, the King of Bling, at George Hall to uncover the man behind the darts legend.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: ADC Global Championship 2025/26: Group 8.

programme.title: The Best of Fallon Sherrock: Top Moments & Highlights

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Familien er tilbake for å godtgjøre sine største ferietabber og avsløre store kysthemmeligheter - hvilke samboere datet i sin tid?! Pluss en hemmelig gjest etterlater kjøttbollene sparkende og skrikende - Jersey Shores familieferies gjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Famileferiens morodag fortsetter! Margaritaer blandes og alt snus på hodet, men hvilke samboere tar en omgang på strippestangen? Finn det ut i andre del av Jersey Shores familieferies gjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Paparazzi, pappaer og publikasjoner
programme.desc: Mike avholder en fest (for seg selv), uten at samboerne aner hvorfor. Samtidig tar Angelinas følelsesmessige reise endelig slutt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Realitetsorientering
programme.desc: Mens Mike holder lanseringsfesten for den selvutleverende biografien sin, avsløres noe sjokkerende som gjør gjengen målløse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Snooki-kvelden
programme.desc: Snooki-kvelden blir til en jentekveld, som igjen gjør så Mike flykter til Vegas for en guttekveld med MVP. Dessuten stikker Jenni og Sammi innom Angelina, og tingene blir litt kompliserte.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore-dagen
programme.desc: Et avhopp til Atlantic City blir sexy da Vinny stripper. Familiemiddagen tar av da saftige hemmeligheter blir avslørt. Angelina har noe uuttalt med Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Direkte til kysten!
programme.desc: Familien drar tilbake til sitt gamle stamsted for en artig dag med mimring, mens Mike of Nicole diskuterer Jersey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jetsdagen
programme.desc: Gjengen overtar MetLife stadion for en storslått New York Jets-kamp. Lauren verver Pauly som hjelp til å gi Mike noen spennende nyheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Familiemøte
programme.desc: Snooki inviterer gjengen til Nashville, og Mike foreslår at Ron skal være med på turen. Det eneste dlemmaet er at Ron og Sammi ikke har oppholdt seg i samme rom på over ti år!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rhinestone Cowboy
programme.desc: Gjengen er i Nashville og Snooki klar for å utvide forretningen sin. Mike beblander seg med lokalbefolkningen...nærmest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Music City Kjøttboller
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene overtar Nashville via kryss og tvang. The Situation spiser for mye. Samboerne lurer på hvordan Angelinas ankomst påvirker reisens energi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie og Sam
programme.desc: Spenningen stiger mellom Angelina og Sammi. Ronnies lenge imøtesette ankomst slår følelsgnister fra samboerne da de treffes i Nashville.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jerseys varm kylling-utfordring
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen mellom Ronnie og Sammi blir kjempeklein. Paulys vil bryte spenningen og får samboerne til å spise varm kylling. Vinny spiser varm mat.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Er du venner med henne?
programme.desc: Deena er i bakgrunnen med turplanleggingen da gjengen planlegger familieferie til Tucson. Etterpå deltar Sammi i en a viral TikTok.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore fanklubb
programme.desc: Tucson-oppholdet blir verre da en Jersey Shore-fanklubb lekker Angelinas DM. Tingene tilspisser seg mellom Angelina og Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie, Sammi og Justin
programme.desc: Mike tar en nødsamtale til Thomaste da feiden mellom Sammi og Angelina begynner å koke. Ronnie drar til Tucson for nok en familieferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: OG-kvelden
programme.desc: Gjengen tar oss tilbake til 2009. Pauly planlegger et puss. Mike vil skrive en beskjed.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gratulerer med dagen, Snooki!
programme.desc: Turen er i ferd med å avsluttes da RSVP rider innn i det gamle Tucson for å legge an på noen cowboyer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene er tilbake for å avholde Sammi og Rons lenge etterlengtede gjenforening. Mike tar nok en bit av Nashvilles hete kylling, og vi finner ut om våpenhvilen mellom Angelina og Sammi stadig gjelder i første del av gjenforeningsspesialen..

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's best friend moves away, while Annie's best friend from high school returns and makes a pass at Matt.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie blows a fuse when her recently widowed father comes to town with his new girlfriend. Wait till she finds out that Mary’s new boyfriend has a son.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary undergoes surgery after getting hit by a car and Annie prays for strength to forgive her father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Don't Take My Love Away
programme.desc: At the church, Mary and Lucy get into a brawl right before the ceremony. It seems to clear the air and the slightly disheveled girls reappear with big smiles as the wedding march begins.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: See You in September
programme.desc: Annie and Eric can’t wait for the kids to go back to school, but they’re no sooner out the door than they’re home again...and in trouble.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Love You
programme.desc: When Matt catches the younger kids snooping, he sets a trap. But he catches Dad instead.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Who Knew?
programme.desc: Dad freaks out when he finds a joint in the house, and his trust for Matt may be lost.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Says Who?
programme.desc: Simon’s experiment with mind control backfires when Matt turns the tables and convinces him that he’s shrinking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: The Camden house feels like Heartbreak Hotel when Wilson and Mary split up and Matt gets a “Dear John” letter from Heather.
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Lucy innocently courts trouble by prancing around the mall in a short skirt and high heels while Eric helps a not-so-innocent girl in a gang.
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Do Something
programme.desc: Mom’s muffins are so delicious she decides to go into business…and quickly burns out.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Hate You
programme.desc: The girls learn that words can really hurt people, and Simon befriends a Holocaust survivor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: Mary loses her cool when she finds out her brother paid his friend to go out with her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way
programme.desc: Mary wants to quit the basketball team when a new girl outperforms her.
programme.sub-title: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Rush to Judgment
programme.desc: Mary’s hurt and confused when her coach’s interest in her moves beyond the basketball court.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Stuck in the Middle with You
programme.desc: Two boys are fighting for Lucy’s affections, while Annie and Eric are fighting in a marriage-counseling group.
programme.sub-title: Stuck in the Middle with You

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Red Tape
programme.desc: A mysterious personal ad in the school paper gets Matt more calls than he can handle.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Homecoming
programme.desc: The only thing keeping Mary from getting back on the court after her knee surgery is fear.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles NO
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: #701's Grudge Song
programme.desc: Matsu er igjen på rømmen, og får hjelp av en strippeklubbarbeider som bærer nag til etterforskeren som prøver å finne henne. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Story of Ricky
programme.desc: En ung mann med overmenneskelig styrke blir sendt til et fengsel hvor de blir behandlet som slaver. Han blir tvunget til å bruke sin makt til å beseire de korrupte tjenestemennene og deres lakeier. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China NO
programme.desc: Wong Fei-hung er leder for en kampsportskole på slutten av 1800-tallet som blir tvunget til å handle når skolen blir angrepet av vestlige slavehandlere.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China II NO
programme.desc: Wong Fei-hung treffer på White Lotus, en fanatisk sekt som prøver å drive europeerne ut av Kina med vold. Med sine venner, nære og kjære og Kinas fremtid på spill, må han nok en gang hente frem sine kampsportferdigheter for å forsvare de uskyldige.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week the girls do a beauty shoot for Revlon and some girls are pushed over the edge in a second shoot for 'Galaxy Ripple'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A challenge with Nicky Johnston sees one model facing harsh criticism. The girls then do a photoshoot with TV personality George Lamb and take part in a photoshoot with a London Rugby team for legendary photographer Terry O'Neill.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 5 arrive in Kuala Lumpar and meet with fashion legend Jimmy Choo to take part in a dance challenge. The photoshoot this week takes place at night for Baby G watches.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 4 are sent on go-sees around Kuala Lumpar and are sent to the jungle for their photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 3 recreate some of Elle's most famous poses and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The winner of Britain's Next Top Model is decided in the first ever live final of the series.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed judge the final round of auditions, giving hopefuls one last chance to secure a place at the boot camp

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls who have made it through the audition stage battle it out in boot camp. Twelve girls will be chosen to move into the house and the next stage of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls face their first challenge after moving into the house and learn there will be a double elimination this week. Janice Dickinson helps decide who will be the first two girls eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are given complete makeovers before posing nude for a photo shoot. George Lamb joins the judging panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go one-on-one interviews with The Wanted but for some girls the mistakes just keep coming. Fashion designer Henry Holland joins the judges at panel and it becomes time to rise and smize or become a catwalk casualty.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining girls face another double elimination this week and find themselves being thrown in at the deep end. Katie Price joins the judges on the panel this week.
